tags_helper_text: Add tags to help customers find your product. Tags improve search visibility.
compare_at_price_helper_text: Enter the original price to show a discount. Leave empty if no discount.
name: Name
only_one_image_allowed: Only one image allowed in basic mode
sale_price_required: Sale price must be greater than 0
advanced_mode_description: Create products with multiple variants and options
simple_mode_description: Quick product creation with basic pricing and inventory
switch_to_simple_warning: Switching to simple mode will remove all variants except the default one. This action cannot be undone. Continue?
switch_to_advanced_warning: Switch to advanced mode to create product variants with different options (size, color, etc.)?
product_options_description: Define options like size, color, or material that create different variants
no_options_description: Add options to create product variants with different combinations
variants_auto_generated: Variants are automatically generated from your options
bulk_edit_description: Apply values to all variants at once
no_variants_description: Add variants to create different combinations of this product with options like size, color, or material
media_id_helper_text: Enter the media ID for this variant's image
variant_images_info_description: In advanced mode, you can upload a specific image for each variant. Expand a variant row below to upload its image.
add_option_values_description: Define option values above to automatically generate variants
at_least_one_variant_required: At least one variant is required
one_variant_must_be_default: One variant must be marked as default
all_variants_must_have_price: All variants must have a price greater than $0
compare_at_price_must_be_greater_than_pr: Compare at price must be greater than or equal to the regular price
are_you_sure_delete: Are you sure want to delete
are_u_sure_to_delete: Are you sure you want to delete {{item}}: {{item2}}?
only_admin_can_see_this_item: Only admin can see this item
phone_is_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number
phone_helper: Enter your Algerian phone number (05XX, 06XX, or 07XX). The +213 prefix will be added automatically.
please_check_your_phone_and_password: Please check your phone number and password
by_signing_up_i_agree_to: By signing up, I agree to
manage_store_description: Manage your online store efficiently. Create products, publish them, receive orders, and deliver to your customers seamlessly.
manage_work_effectively: Manage your work more effectively with Markium
store_starting_point: Your complete e-commerce solution. Create products, publish online, receive orders, and deliver seamlessly to your customers.
create_products_desc: Easily create product listings with images, descriptions, and pricing. Publish instantly to your online store.
manage_orders_desc: Track all incoming orders in one place. Process, update status, and manage customer requests seamlessly.
track_delivery_desc: Monitor delivery status, coordinate with logistics, and ensure timely delivery to your customers.
store_solution: Everything you need to run a successful online store. Streamline your workflow and grow your business.
confirm_status_change: Are you sure you want to change order {{order}} status to {{status}}?
are_you_sure_delete_media: Are you sure you want to delete this media? This action cannot be undone.
no_inventory_movements_recorded: No inventory movements have been recorded yet
no_individual_items_tracked: No individual items are being tracked for this inventory
no_item_movements_recorded: No item movements have been recorded yet
adjust_inventory_description: Add or subtract inventory with tracking
adjustment_notes_placeholder: Enter reason for adjustment (e.g., Restocking from supplier, Damaged goods, etc.)
low_stock_alert: You have {count} items with low stock
low_stock_alert_description: These items are running low and may need restocking soon.
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete?
select_from_existing_media_or_upload_new: Select from existing media or upload new
payment_methods_paragraph: Manage different payment methods related to your operations. You can add new payment methods or edit existing ones to keep your data updated.
notFoundDescription: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for. Perhaps you've mistyped the URL? Be sure to check your spelling.
contact_support_description: Get in touch with our support team through your preferred communication channel
contact_support_info_message: Our support team is available to assist you with any questions or issues you may have. Choose your preferred communication method below.
arabic_support_description: Connect with our Arabic-speaking support team for assistance in your native language. We're here to help with all your questions and concerns.
french_support_description: Contactez notre équipe de support francophone pour une assistance dans votre langue. Nous sommes là pour répondre à toutes vos questions.
support_hours_description: We're here to help you. Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you.
telegram_description: Reach us instantly via Telegram for quick responses and real-time support. Fast, secure, and convenient.
facebook_support_description: Follow our Facebook page to stay updated with the latest news, updates, and community discussions.
default_store_language_description: Choose the primary language for your store. This will be the default language shown to your customers.
store_language_info_message: Select the default language for your store. You can change this setting at any time.
english_language_description: Set English as your store's primary language. Ideal for international audiences.
arabic_language_description: Set Arabic as your store's primary language. Perfect for Arabic-speaking customers with RTL support.
french_language_description: Set French as your store's primary language. Ideal for French-speaking markets.
language_preview_info: Your store will display in {language} by default for all visitors.
creator: Creator
are_you_sure_want_to_delete: Are you sure you want to delete?
are_you_sure_want_to_ban: Are you sure you want to ban this user?
are_you_sure_want_to_activate: Are you sure you want to activate this user?
are_you_sure_you_want_to_deploy_this_pro: Are you sure you want to deploy this product?
are_you_sure_you_want_to_publish_this_pr: Are you sure you want to publish this product?
please_check_your_username_and_password: Please check your username and password
password_must_be_at_least_8_characters: Password must be at least 8 characters
password_must_contain_uppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
password_must_contain_lowercase: Must contain at least one lowercase letter
password_must_contain_number: Must contain at least one number
password_must_contain_special_char: Must contain at least one special character
one_uppercase_one_lowercase: ✔ At least one uppercase and lowercase letter
one_number_one_special_char: ✔ At least one number and special character
do_not_use_arabic_letters: Please do not use Arabic letters
phone_number_must_be_number: Phone number must be a number
at_least_one_role_required: At least one role must be selected
confirm_password_required: Confirming the new password is required
item_not_verified: This item has not been activated by the system administrator
phone_number_must_be_10_digits_starting_: Phone number must be 10 digits and start with 05
file_size_exceeds_2mb: File size must be less than 2MB
invoice_file_size_exceeds_2mb: Invoice file size must be less than 2MB
username_min_length: Username must be at least 3 characters
username_max_length: Username must be at most 30 characters
username_invalid_format: Username must start with an English letter
username_invalid_characters: Only English letters, numbers, and symbols (_ .) are allowed
username_no_spaces: Spaces are not allowed in the username
phone_number_must_be_numeric: Phone number must contain only numbers
restrictedAccess: The page you are trying to access is restricted
validation_required: This field is required and cannot be left empty
validation_minValue: The minimum value must be present
validation_maxValue: The maximum value must be present
validation_noDuplicateProps: Duplicate property names are not allowed
validation_isNonNumber: Name cannot be just a number
user_is_banned: Your account is frozen. It has been banned by the administrator.
this_number_is_already_in_use: This number is already in use
please_enter_number_beginning_with_966_o: Please enter a number beginning with +966 or 05
phone_number_must_be_12_digits_for_966: Phone number must be 12 digits when starting with 966
phone_number_must_be_10_digits_for_05: Phone number must be 10 digits when starting with 05
hover_to_see_events: Hover on dates to see events
name_must_be_more_than_3_characters: Name must be more than 3 characters
name_cannot_have_leading_or_trailing_spa: Name cannot have leading or trailing spaces
product_original_desc: We ensure you receive only authentic products from verified manufacturers and authorized distributors.
product_replacement_desc: Free replacement within 10 days if you receive a defective or damaged product.
product_warranty_desc: Full manufacturer warranty coverage for 1 year from the date of purchase.
rating_must_be_greater: Rating must be greater than or equal to 1
email_must_be_valid: Email must be a valid email address
manage_logo_language_contacts: Manage logo, language, and contact info
general_settings_info_message: Configure your store's essential settings including logo, language, and contact information all in one place.
template_selection_description: Choose a template that best represents your brand and appeals to your target audience. You can change this at any time.
select_template_description: Select a template below to preview and apply it to your store
template_clothing_description: Perfect template for fashion and apparel stores
template_shoes_description: Elegant design for footwear and accessories stores
template_furniture_description: Spacious layout ideal for furniture and home decor
template_kitchen_description: Modern design for kitchen appliances and cookware
template_jewellery_description: Luxurious template for jewelry and precious items
template_autoparts_description: Professional layout for automotive parts and accessories
template_islamic-lib_description: Elegant design for Islamic books and religious content stores
template_islamic-lib2_description: Alternative elegant design for Islamic books and religious content
template_spices_description: Traditional and aromatic design celebrating the richness of spices and herbs
template_bags_description: Modern and elegant design perfect for bags and accessories stores
template_hardware-store_description: Professional and robust design perfect for hardware and tools stores
template_electronics_description: Modern and tech-focused design perfect for electronics and gadget stores
template_health-cosmetics_description: Clean and elegant design perfect for health and beauty stores
template_women-fashion_description: Elegant and stylish design perfect for women's fashion and apparel stores
template_default_description: Universal template suitable for all store types
logo_guidelines_description: Upload a square logo with transparent background for best results. Recommended size is 512x512 pixels.
upload_your_store_logo: Upload your store logo to display across your store
website_must_be_valid_url: Website must be a valid URL
store_information_description: Manage your store's business information and contact details that will be displayed to customers.
store_slug_helper: Your store will be accessible at this subdomain. Use only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
store_slug_min_length: Store subdomain must be at least 3 characters
store_slug_max_length: Store subdomain must be at most 30 characters
store_slug_invalid_format: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens are allowed
store_slug_no_hyphen_edges: Subdomain cannot start or end with a hyphen
store_slug_reserved: This subdomain is reserved and cannot be used. Please choose a different one.
describe_your_store: Describe your store and what makes it unique
auto_renew_description: Automatically renew your subscription before it expires
points_reset_warning: Points reset annually on January 1st. Unused points will be forfeited.
upload_additional_images_description: Upload additional images for this product. You can add multiple images at once.
marketing_pixels_info_message: Configure your social media pixels and analytics tracking IDs. These will be automatically integrated into your store to track conversions and user behavior.
facebook_pixel_id_required: Facebook Pixel ID is required when enabled
facebook_pixel_description: Track conversions and build audiences for Facebook Ads
facebook_pixel_instructions: Get your Pixel ID from Facebook Events Manager (Business Settings > Data Sources > Pixels). The ID is a 15-16 digit number.
tiktok_pixel_id_required: TikTok Pixel ID is required when enabled
tiktok_pixel_description: Measure the performance of your TikTok ad campaigns
tiktok_pixel_instructions: Find your Pixel ID in TikTok Ads Manager under Assets > Events. The format is usually a 20-character alphanumeric code.
google_analytics_id_required: Google Analytics ID is required when enabled
google_analytics_description: Track and analyze your website traffic and user behavior
google_analytics_instructions: Get your Tracking ID from Google Analytics Admin panel. It starts with 'UA-' (Universal Analytics) or 'G-' (GA4).
google_tag_manager_id_required: Google Tag Manager ID is required when enabled
google_tag_manager_description: Manage all your marketing tags in one place
google_tag_manager_instructions: Find your Container ID in Google Tag Manager workspace settings. It starts with 'GTM-' followed by characters.
snapchat_pixel_id_required: Snapchat Pixel ID is required when enabled
snapchat_pixel_description: Track conversions from your Snapchat ad campaigns
pinterest_tag_id_required: Pinterest Tag ID is required when enabled
pinterest_tag_description: Measure and optimize your Pinterest ad performance
twitter_pixel_id_required: Twitter Pixel ID is required when enabled
twitter_pixel_description: Track conversions and engagement from Twitter Ads
pixel_configuration_hint: Enter your pixel ID and configuration details below. Make sure to test the integration after saving.
enable_pixel_to_configure: Enable this pixel to configure its settings
delivery_companies_info_message: Configure your delivery companies API credentials. Enable each company you want to integrate and provide the required API information.
payment_methods_info_message: Configure your payment gateway API credentials. Enable each payment method you want to integrate and provide the required API information.
no_payment_methods_configured: No payment methods configured. Please configure payment methods in settings.
default_payment_method_set: {{name}} has been set as default payment method
credit_card_description: Pay securely using your credit or debit card
cod_description: Pay with cash when your order is delivered
yalidine_description: Fast and reliable delivery service across Algeria
yalidine_integration_instructions: Get your API credentials from Yalidine dashboard under Settings > API Access. You'll need your API ID and Token.
zrexpress_integration_instructions: Find your API credentials in ZR Express merchant portal under Integration > API Keys.
maystro_integration_instructions: Access your Maystro API credentials from your merchant account settings.
ecotrack_integration_instructions: Obtain API credentials from Ecotrack dashboard under Developer > API Settings.
save_connection_first: Please save the connection first before validating
error_loading_providers: Error loading delivery providers. Please try again.
no_providers_available: No delivery providers available at the moment.
connection_configured: Connection is configured and ready to use.
update_credentials_message: Enter new credentials to update the connection.
connection_exists_message: Connection already exists. Leave fields empty to keep existing credentials, or enter new values to update.
primary_color_description: Select a primary color for your brand. A complete color palette will be generated automatically.
palette_will_be_logged_to_console: The generated palette will be logged to console for development use
color_palette_reset_successfully: Color palette reset to default successfully
color_palette_info_message: Choose a primary color and we'll generate a complete, harmonious color palette for your brand. The palette includes primary, secondary, tertiary colors, backgrounds, text colors, borders, gradients, and shadows.
confirm_reset_color_palette_message: Are you sure you want to reset the color palette to default? This action cannot be undone.
manage_contact_info_and_social_links: Manage contact information and social media links
contact_information_description: Add your store's contact details so customers can reach you easily
social_media_links_description: Connect your social media profiles to increase your store's visibility
contacts_social_info_message: Provide your contact information and social media links to help customers connect with your store across multiple channels.
contacts_social_saved_successfully: Contacts and social media links saved successfully
see_the_difference: See the difference between managing your store with and without our platform
global_reach_desc: Sell to customers worldwide with ease
real_time_analytics_desc: Make informed decisions with live insights
everything_you_need: Everything you need to run and grow your online store
multi_store_management_desc: Manage multiple stores from a single dashboard
customizable_templates_desc: 14+ beautiful themes for every business type
advanced_analytics_desc: Track sales, customers, and performance in real-time
integrated_delivery_desc: Connect with major delivery companies seamlessly
payment_gateway_desc: Accept payments from multiple providers securely
mobile_apps_desc: Manage your store on-the-go with our mobile app
multi_language_desc: Reach customers in Arabic, English, and French
simple_steps_success: Simple steps to launch and grow your successful online store
step_1_desc: Create your account and set up your store profile in minutes
step_2_desc: Select from 14+ professional themes and customize your brand
step_3_desc: Upload your products with images, prices, and descriptions
step_4_desc: Go live and start accepting orders from customers
step_5_desc: Use analytics to optimize and expand your business
trusted_by_thousands: Trusted by thousands of successful merchants worldwide
testimonial_1_content: Markium transformed my business! The templates are beautiful and the dashboard is so easy to use. My sales increased 300% in the first 3 months.
testimonial_2_content: The integrated delivery system saved me countless hours. I can now focus on growing my business instead of managing logistics.
testimonial_3_content: As a traditional spices seller, I was hesitant about going online. Markium made it incredibly simple. Now I ship across the country!
testimonial_4_content: The multi-language support helped me reach international customers. The analytics show me exactly what's working and what's not.
testimonial_5_content: Managing inventory across multiple locations was a nightmare. Markium's system automated everything and reduced errors to almost zero.
testimonial_6_content: The customizable templates let me showcase my designs beautifully. Customer feedback has been amazing since switching to Markium.
integrated_with_leading: Integrated with leading platforms and delivery services worldwide
choose_perfect_plan: Choose the Perfect Plan for You
flexible_pricing_desc: Flexible pricing that grows with your business
contact_sales_desc: Our sales team is here to help you find the right plan
plan_starter_desc: Perfect for small businesses just getting started
plan_professional_desc: For growing businesses that need more power
error_loading_shipping_rates: Error loading shipping rates. Please try again.
no_shipping_rates_available: No shipping rates available for this order.
onboarding_complete_steps: Complete these steps to start selling
onboarding_dismiss_tooltip: You can restore this from your dashboard later
onboarding_progress_tooltip: Complete all steps to get your store ready
onboarding_account_created_desc: Your account is ready to use
onboarding_verify_phone_desc: Verify your number to unlock all features
onboarding_add_product_desc: Create your first product to sell
onboarding_customize_store_desc: Add your logo, choose colors and template
welcome_new_user_subtitle: Start building your online store today! Follow the simple steps to add your products and start selling.
welcome_tip_upload_first: Tip: Upload your product images first to make product creation easier
empty_products_description: Start selling your products in 3 easy steps
empty_products_time_tip: Average time for first product: 2 minutes
empty_orders_description_with_products: Your products are ready! Here are some tips to increase sales
empty_orders_description_no_products: Add products first to start receiving orders
empty_orders_tip1: Share your store link on social media
empty_orders_tip2: Add clear and attractive product images
empty_orders_encouragement: Most stores receive their first order within 3 days
analytics_not_configured: Analytics is not configured. Please set up your PostHog credentials to view analytics data.
analytics_no_store: No store associated with your account. Analytics data requires an active store.
payment_success_description: Your payment has been processed successfully. Thank you for your purchase!
payment_failed_description: Unfortunately, your payment could not be processed. Please try again or use a different payment method.
secure_payment_description: Your payment information is encrypted and secure
tour_welcome_content: This is your store overview where you can track your progress
tour_setup_content: Follow these steps to get your store ready for customers
tour_products_content: Start by creating your first product to begin selling
unsaved_changes_message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close?
no_orders_description: When customers place orders, they will appear here.
insight_pending_orders: You have {{count}} pending orders awaiting action
insight_all_good: Everything looks good! Keep up the great work.

tooltip_total_revenue: Total revenue in the selected period
